title: Powering Millions of AI-Driven GTM Workflows with Deep, Reliable Web Data from Nimble
verified_facts: Alta is described as a GTM operating system.
Its AI agents require structured external data about prospects, competitors, customer stories, technographics, and buying signals.
The case study describes millions of pages processed per day.
The case study reports 3–4x deeper context and greater than 99 percent job success.

title: Elevating AI Code Review with Nimble's Web Search Agents
verified_facts: Qodo needs fresh context from GitHub, open-source libraries, and domain-specific sources.
Page discovery without structured extraction was insufficient.
The case study reports fewer support tickets and higher customer satisfaction.

title: Scaling Reliable E-commerce Data with Nimble's Web API
verified_facts: Grips is described as an e-commerce data and insights business.
The case study describes product and pricing intelligence across 45,000 websites and 65,000 brands.
